description: Multi-file request signing SDK: 6 files with cross-file dependencies via globalThis. Agent must trace the signing pipeline across polyfills(storage→config→crypto→signer→client), identify noise (polyfills.js), decode base64-encoded config values, and find the API_SALT.

files.name: polyfills.js
files.purpose: ES5 compatibility shims (Array.indexOf, Object.keys, Date.now, String.trim). Not business logic — noise file that exists purely for compatibility.

files.name: storage.js
files.purpose: Auth token persistence layer: localStorage with cookie fallback. Provides get/set/remove/clear for auth_token, refresh_token, token_expiry.

files.name: config.js
files.purpose: API configuration center: stores API_SALT, API_ENDPOINT, VERSION, feature flags. Contains 2 base64-encoded values that must be decoded: VkVSSUZZX0tFWT1hYmMxMjNkZWY0NTY= → VERIFY_KEY=abc123def456, RkVBVFVSRV9FTkFCTEVE → FEATURE_ENABLED.

files.name: crypto.js
files.purpose: Cryptographic utilities: full RFC 1321 MD5 implementation + random nonce generator (16-char hex) + hex string converter. Provides hash, generateNonce, hexToString.

files.name: signer.js
files.purpose: Request signing engine: sorts params alphabetically, constructs sign string in format {sorted_params}|{API_SALT}|{timestamp}|{nonce}, produces MD5 signature. Also provides signature verification.

files.name: client.js
files.purpose: SDK entry point: initSDK() orchestrates the full pipeline. Reads cached token from storage, calls signer.sign(), sends XHR POST with signature headers, caches new tokens from response.

dataFlow: client.js:initSDK checks __POLYFILLS_READY__ → sendSignedRequest reads __STORAGE__.getToken('auth_token') → calls __signRequest__.sign(params) → signer.buildSignString reads __CONFIG__.API_SALT and SEPARATOR → calls __MD5__.hash(raw) → XHR POST to __CONFIG__.API_ENDPOINT → caches response token via __STORAGE__.setToken

filePurposes.polyfills.js: ES5 compatibility shims — noise file, not business logic
filePurposes.storage.js: Auth token persistence via localStorage with cookie fallback
filePurposes.config.js: API configuration: salt=x7k9m_2025, endpoint=https://api.example.com/v1/sign. 2 base64-encoded values.
filePurposes.crypto.js: MD5 hashing + random nonce generator (16 chars)
filePurposes.signer.js: Request signing: sort params → concat with salt|ts|nonce → MD5 digest
filePurposes.client.js: Entry point: initSDK → orchestrate sign + XHR + token cache

apiEndpoints.purpose: Send signed API request with signature headers
